title: Extra Select Premium Floating Swan and Duck Feed, 1 Litre (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
Healthy Food: Our duck and swan food is packed with protein, fats, and essential vitamins to support all the waterfowl in your duck pond.
An All Birds Food: For all our feathered friends, from majestic swans to a humble duckling feed, it's a versatile wild bird food.
Better than Bread: Despite what you may think, bread is a poor duck feed. Packed with carbs and little else, uneaten bites can cause ecosystem damage.
Ready for Winter: Using these swan and duck pellets can help provide your local avian population critical energy for winter.
Fun Family Feeding: Feeding the ducks is a classic and wonderful pastime. Build those memories with a wholesome floating duck food that really nourishes.
description: Indications Protein 19%, Fats & Oils 4%, Fibres 2.5%, Ash 7.5%, Calcium 1.8%, Phosphorus 0.87%, Moisture 13.8% Ingredients Wheat, Fish Meal, Soya (bean) Meal, Maize, Crustacean Meal, Monocalcium Phosphate, Vegetable Oil & fat (soya), Calcium Carbonate. Directions Suitable for all native waterfowl, scatter on water and feed as required. This is a complementary food that should be fed ad lib. See more

specifications_table.Allergen Information: ‎Crustaceans may contain, Gluten may contain, Soy may contain, Wheat may contain
specifications_table.Storage Information: ‎To be stored in a cool, dry plave and sealed after opening.
